Millions of customers — including the fastest-growing startups, largest enterprises, and leading government agencies — are using AWS to lower costs, become more agile, and innovate faster.

title: Back to Basics: Protecting Your Network in the Cloud
description:
Learn the basics of protecting your network in the cloud. Great network security has multiple layers that block unintended traffic while allowing legitimate access.

In this video, you'll learn network security best practices like:
📍 Configuring security groups as virtual firewalls for EC2 instances 
📍 Using Elastic Load Balancers for traffic distribution and web application firewalls 
📍 Implementing VPCs with private/public subnets and network ACLs 
📍 Setting up NAT Gateways for outbound internet access 
📍 Using VPC Endpoints for private AWS service connections 
📍 Adding AWS WAF, Shield, and CloudFront for edge protection

Walk through building a layered architecture with these services to mitigate misconfigurations and ensure only approved traffic reaches your applications.

Learn these cloud networking fundamentals and patterns for locking down your environment.

Check out more resources for architecting in the #AWS cloud:
http://amzn.to/3qXIsWN

#AWS #AmazonWebServices #CloudComputing #BackToBasics #CloudSecurity #NetworkSecurity #AWSNetworking #VPC #SecurityGroups #LoadBalancing #CloudFront #WebAppFirewall #DDoSProtection
